shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.desc: Learn about delivery options and rates

faq.q1: How do I track my order?
faq.a1: You can track your order in real-time by visiting your account dashboard and clicking on "My Orders". You'll receive email notifications at each stage of your delivery.
faq.a2: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Products must be in original condition with all packaging. Simply initiate a return from your account, and we'll provide a prepaid shipping label.
faq.a3: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days. Shipping times are calculated from the order confirmation date.
faq.a4: Yes, we ship to over 150 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. You can check shipping costs at checkout before completing your purchase.
faq.q5: How do I reset my password?
faq.a5: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email address. You'll receive a password reset link within minutes. Follow the instructions to create a new password.
faq.a6: Yes, we use industry-standard SSL encryption and PCI DSS compliance to protect your payment information. We never store full credit card details on our servers.

about.heroDesc: FastE is an e-commerce platform built purely for learning, research, and technology exploration.
about.missionDesc1: FastE is built with the mission of providing a fully-featured e-commerce platform — including product, order, user, and payment management — for the purpose of research and learning.
about.missionDesc2: The project is developed by an individual driven by a passion for technology, aiming to explore modern technologies in the e-commerce domain.
about.visionDesc1: Create a comprehensive demo system that reflects the core features of real-world marketplaces like Shopee, Lazada, and Tiki.
about.visionDesc2: Help oneself and the community gain deep understanding of system architecture, UI/UX, APIs, and state management in real applications.
about.coreValuesDesc: The principles that guide every decision made throughout the project.
about.teamDesc: This project is driven by passion and self-learning.
about.ctaDesc: Experience the full features of the platform — from the customer interface to the seller dashboard.

values.customerFirstDesc: Every feature is built based on real-world scenarios, not theoretical concepts.
values.innovationDesc: Continuously updating technologies, design patterns, and software architecture to stay current.
values.communityDesc: Aimed at sharing knowledge and inspiration with the developer community.

teamBios.ceo: Founder of the FastE project, responsible for designing and implementing the entire frontend system.
teamBios.cto: Designs RESTful APIs, manages databases, and handles business logic.
teamBios.design: Builds a consistent, user-friendly, and visually appealing design system.
teamBios.ops: Manages deployment, CI/CD, and environment setup.

disclaimer.title: About This Project
disclaimer.desc1: FastE is built entirely for the purpose of learning, exploration, and technology discovery. It is a personal project with no backing from any business or organization.
disclaimer.desc2: This project has no commercial purpose, generates no profit, and is not intended for personal gain in any form.

commitments.1: No real user data is used for selling or advertising
commitments.2: All data displayed on the platform is demo / hypothetical data
commitments.3: Not deployed for commercial purposes without appropriate licensing
commitments.4: Source code is publicly shared for reference and educational purposes
